messages.content: I run GG Solutions LLC out of Greenwich — AI consultancy but nobody knows we exist.

For GG Solutions, the wedge isn't more reach yet — it's making one clear path from your walterreid.com presence to a conversation. Gen-X owners in Fairfield County who already know AI matters but feel stuck are your natural fit; I'd start by naming one offer on a single page before spending on Greenwich or LinkedIn boosts.
